gap_table.gap: Synthetic MRI response exists; public MRI/PET-CT data must be downloaded for image-level validation.
Ultrasound is not part of the synthetic treatment timeline yet; use public US as a separate narrow imaging benchmark.
CT/PET-CT public data can support lesion workflows, but disease-origin and metastatic breast cancer labels remain limited.
Current safest support is report-text extraction. Image-level ascites requires curated labels or annotation.

recommended_actions: Keep report-text extraction as the patient-facing CT/US route until image labels are task-specific.
Download BUSI or BUS-UCLM first for the fastest image-model proof of work.
Use DeepLesion or FDG-PET-CT-Lesions for CT/PET-CT ingestion and lesion-localization workflow only.
Add synthetic ultrasound/CT report events only as monitoring signals, not diagnosis labels.
Show missing public datasets explicitly in the admin dashboard to avoid overclaiming.
claim_boundary: This report identifies engineering coverage gaps. It does not validate clinical performance.
